original_description: Progressive multi-level codebase analysis — maps architecture from business domain down to runtime behavior across 8 zoom levels with 6 cross-cutting lenses. Persists findings as architecture docs, mulch records, and seeds issues. Use when: "what is this codebase?", "onboard me", "map this project", "diagnose this repo", "analyze architecture", "what are the subsystems?", entering an unfamiliar project, understanding brownfield codebases. Also use when seam-identification or shadow-walk alone isn't enough — when you need the full picture, not just one facet. Do NOT trigger for: implementation planning (use writing-plans), debugging (use systematic-debugging), code review (use interactive-pr-review), quick orientation without persistence (use hybrid-research onboarding mode).

train_results.query: what is this codebase even doing? feels like 3 different apps stitched together
new to this monorepo, can you give me a full picture of how everything connects?
just cloned this repo from the acquisition team, no docs anywhere, need to understand what it actually does before I touch anything
entering this brownfield codebase cold, team is unavailable, need a full diagnostic before sprint planning
generate a changelog for the last two sprints so I can brief the PM
what does the UserController class actually do at runtime? trace the execution path
map out what tests I need to write before modifying the auth module
map the architecture of this service before we start the refactor
what files do I need to change to add a new payment provider?
write characterization tests for the billing subsystem before I touch it
what are the seams in the payment module? want to understand where to inject the new provider

test_results.query: diagnose this repo — inherited it from a contractor, zero handoff docs
seam-identification and shadow-walk both ran but I still don't have a complete picture, need deeper analysis
I found a bug in the subsystem that handles user sessions, help me debug it
analyze architecture — specifically need to understand data flow from ingestion to the API layer
what are the main subsystems in this project?
what does this legacy function actually do — need to understand it before refactoring
plan out the implementation for adding websocket support to this service
analyze this PR before I merge it, want to catch any architectural issues
